target.title: fix(codex): expose assistant completion idle timeout config
target.body:
## Summary

Exposes the existing Codex app-server assistant-completion idle guard as an `openclaw.json` plugin config option:

```json5
{
  plugins: {
    entries: {
      codex: {
        config: {
          appServer: {
            turnAssistantCompletionIdleTimeoutMs: 10000,
          },
        },
      },
    },
  },
}
```

## What Problem This Solves

`runCodexAppServerAttempt` already accepted `turnAssistantCompletionIdleTimeoutMs` as an internal/direct runtime option, but `plugins.entries.codex.config.appServer` exposed only `turnCompletionIdleTimeoutMs` and `postToolRawAssistantCompletionIdleTimeoutMs`.

That meant operators could tune the full turn idle guard and post-tool raw-assistant guard, but could not tune the shorter assistant-completion idle guard that releases a turn after Codex reports a completed assistant message. For Codex Harness validation, this made it harder to test whether short assistant-completion idle release was affecting long post-tool turns.

## Changes

- Adds `appServer.turnAssistantCompletionIdleTimeoutMs` to the Codex plugin config type, zod schema, runtime config key list, manifest schema, and UI hints.
- Normalizes/clamps the value the same way as the other app-server timer config fields.
- Threads the resolved app-server runtime option into `runCodexAppServerAttempt` while preserving direct option precedence.
- Leaves the default unchanged: unset still uses the existing 10000 ms assistant-completion idle timeout.

## Evidence

- `pnpm exec vitest run extensions/codex/src/app-server/config.test.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt.turn-watches.test.ts` -> 2 files passed, 173 tests passed.
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD` -> passed.



## Proof Update (2026-06-29)

Current head after docs update: `1e19150b`.

Validation run:

```text
cd /tmp/openclaw-pr97233
pnpm test -- --run extensions/codex/src/app-server/config.test.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt.turn-watches.test.ts

Test Files  2 passed (2)
Tests       172 passed (172)
```

The config proof is in `extensions/codex/src/app-server/config.test.ts`: plugin config under `plugins.entries.codex.config.appServer.turnAssistantCompletionIdleTimeoutMs` is parsed and normalized into `appServer.turnAssistantCompletionIdleTimeoutMs`.

The release-timing proof is in `extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt.turn-watches.test.ts`: the app-server attempt uses `turnAssistantCompletionIdleTimeoutMs` when assistant-output completion arms the release watch. Changing the configured value changes how long OpenClaw waits for `turn/completed` after the assistant item before interrupt/release.

Docs were added to both Codex Harness docs pages:

- `docs/plugins/codex-harness.md`
- `docs/plugins/codex-harness-reference.md`

The docs now list `appServer.turnAssistantCompletionIdleTimeoutMs`, its `10000` ms default, and the behavior: it is the quiet window after a final/non-commentary assistant item or pre-tool raw assistant completion while OpenClaw still waits for `turn/completed`; raising it gives Codex more time to publish `turn/completed` before OpenClaw interrupts and releases the session lane.
target.author: marchpure
